---
title: Microsoft Intune Endpoint Compliance Adapter — Adapter Validation Suite
doc-type: avs
adapter-id: intune
adapter-class: conformance
mission-class: telemetry
status: reserved
phase: phase-planning
gcc-boundary: gcc-moderate
canon-source: canon/adapter-registry.yaml
derived-from: uiao-core/canon (sync_canon.py)
generated: '2026-04-16'
---

# Microsoft Intune Endpoint Compliance Adapter — Adapter Validation Suite

::: {.callout-note}
## Canon-derived document

**Status:** `reserved` · **Class:** `conformance` · **Mission:** `telemetry` · **Phase:** `phase-planning`

**Canon source:** `canon/adapter-registry.yaml` (propagated by `uiao-core/tools/sync_canon.py`).

The YAML frontmatter and this banner are regenerated from canon on every sync. **Do not hand-edit.** Author new material only below the `## Overview` heading.
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
## Scaffold — awaiting authored content

This document is a stub. Replace every `_TODO — ..._` block with authored content that is consistent with UIAO canon. Canon invariants (`gcc-boundary`, `ssot-mutation: never`, etc.) must never be contradicted.
:::

## Overview

Validation suite for the Intune endpoint compliance adapter covering device compliance state normalization.

**Test coverage:** Type-contract + conformance check. 30/30 conformance PASS.

## Scope

Target surfaces / subsystems: `device-compliance`, `endpoint-protection`, `configuration-profiles`, `update-compliance`

**Validated:** Managed device normalization, compliant/noncompliant counting, evidence bundling.
**Fixtures:** `intune-devices.json` (3 devices: 2 compliant, 1 noncompliant).
**NOT validated:** Live Graph API Intune endpoint (requires Intune license + permissions).

## Controls

NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 controls this adapter supports: `CM-8`, `SI-2`, `CA-7`, `SC-7`

_TODO — For each control, state the adapter's role (primary, supporting, evidence-only). If a control is aspirational, flag as `NEW (Proposed)` per No-Hallucination Protocol._

## Operational profile

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Runtime | `python-3.12` |
| Runtime pin | `TBD` |
| Runner class | `github-hosted` |
| Tenancy | `per-customer` |
| Evidence class | `interval` |
| Retention | `3` year(s) |

## Canon invariants

- `gcc-boundary: gcc-moderate`
- `ssot-mutation: never`
- `certificate-anchored: true`
- `object-identity-only: true`

## Notes from canon

Tier 4 conformance adapter. Endpoint compliance telemetry via Microsoft Graph API (Intune device compliance + Defender for Endpoint). Natural complement to the m365 modernization adapter. Read-only — observes device state, never mutates configuration.

## References

- UIAO-CANON-003

---

*Generated by `uiao-core/tools/sync_canon.py`. See `uiao-core/ARCHITECTURE.md` §4 for the cross-repo sync contract. See `uiao-docs/_quarto.yml` for rendering configuration.*

## Integration Test Plan

Per `uiao-core/canon/specs/adapter-integration-test-plan.md` v1.0.

**Vendor API:** Microsoft Graph API (Intune)
**Authentication:** OAuth client-credential
**Fixture files:** `intune-devices.json`
**Runner class:** `github-hosted`
**Controls:** CM-8, SI-2, CA-7, SC-7

### Phase 4: Acceptance Test Cases

| # | Test | Input | Expected Output |
|---|------|-------|-----------------|
| A1 | Connect to Intune | Real Graph credentials | ConnectionProvenance with /deviceManagement |
| A2 | List managed devices | Graph /managedDevices | ClaimSet with compliance states |
| A3 | Evidence with counts | Full device fleet | EvidenceObject with compliant/noncompliant |

### Current Phase Status

| Phase | Status | Evidence |
|-------|--------|----------|
| 1. Unit | PASS | 30/30 conformance + behavioral tests |
| 2. Integration | PASS | OSCAL SAR/POA&M/SSP pipeline proven |
| 3. System | PASS | CI-gated (adapter-conformance.yml) |
| 4. Acceptance | PENDING | Requires real vendor credentials |
| 5. Production | PENDING | Requires Phase 4 + runner deployment |
